title: Ripple Targets Agentic Payments Market With XRPL Starter Kit
message_html: Ripple Targets Agentic Payments Market With XRPL Starter Kit ...
snippet: Ripple has launched a new set of tools, documentation and integrations designed to help developers build agentic payment applications on the XRP Ledger (XRPL) blockchain. The company’s new XRPL AI Starter Kit supports payments that use the x402 protocol, the XRP token and the Ripple USD (RLUSD) stab
